name: openspec-webui
description: Interactive browser UI for OpenSpec projects with server-side project selection

scripts.build: node ./scripts/run-local-bin.mjs tsc && node ./scripts/run-local-bin.mjs vite build --config frontend/vite.config.ts
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test src/parser/changes.test.ts src/parser/project.test.ts src/server/project-registry.test.ts src/server/server.integration.test.ts frontend/src/stores/theme.test.ts frontend/src/stores/uiPreferences.test.ts frontend/src/stores/projectSync.test.ts frontend/src/stores/projectsCore.test.ts frontend/src/stores/commandPreferencesCore.test.ts frontend/src/lib/utils.test.ts frontend/src/lib/contextCopy.test.ts frontend/src/lib/commandShortcuts.test.ts frontend/src/lib/projectPlanningContext.test.ts scripts/dev-utils.test.mjs

author: oioi555
